notes: HAR-767 captures giftCardCreate initial value validation against the shop giftCardConfiguration.issueLimit. The live fixture documents the configured CAD issue limit and records boundary success at the limit plus GIFT_CARD_LIMIT_EXCEEDED for one cent over and for a well-over-limit value. Proxy replay uses a cassette-backed read-only giftCardConfiguration fetch before local create staging; supported giftCardCreate remains local-only.

targets.name: boundary initial value equal to issue limit succeeds

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy stages giftCardCreate locally and returns a synthetic GiftCard GID.

targets.name: initial value one cent over issue limit is rejected
well over issue limit is rejected
